source_pr.title: ddl: avoid assert in hook function.
source_pr.body: Hook function runs in another goroutine, assert failed will silently exit that goroutine.

root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to async hook callbacks running in another goroutine and accessing/asserting on shared state without proper synchronization. This PR stabilizes it by avoiding `c.Assert` inside the hook goroutine and instead capturing errors under a mutex and asserting in the main test goroutine.
fix_pattern: Avoid assertions inside async hook goroutines; capture errors with synchronization and assert in the main test goroutine to prevent racy/hidden failures.

evidence: files: ddl/foreign_key_test.go, ddl/bg_worker_test.go, ddl/column_change_test.go, ddl/column_test.go, ddl/ddl_test.go, ddl/ddl_worker_test.go, ddl/index_change_test.go, ddl/index_test.go, ddl/reorg_test.go, ddl/schema_test.go, ddl/stat_test.go, ddl/table_test.go
